content: Phase 1: Setup environment & install dependencies
Phase 1: Create POC script - validate Smart Journal core
Phase 1: Run POC and fix until ALL tests pass - 15/15 PASSED
Phase 2: Get design guidelines from design_agent (Kemenag green theme)
Phase 2: Backend - Auth (username/password + math captcha + JWT + rate limit)
Phase 2: Backend - User management with 9 roles + multi-role switching
Phase 2: Backend - Master Data (academic year, classes, rooms, subjects, schedules)
Phase 2: Backend - Smart Journal endpoints (QR validation + schedule + GPS)
Phase 2: Backend - QR Code generator with B5 card template upload
Phase 2: Backend - Public real-time monitoring endpoint
Phase 2: Backend - Audit log + Security log + Branding settings
Phase 2: Backend - Seed demo accounts + auto-refresh active schedule
Phase 2: Frontend - Theme + Auth + Routing + AppShell
Phase 2: Frontend - Login + Math Captcha + Role Switcher
Phase 2: Frontend - 5 Role-based Dashboards
Phase 2: Frontend - Smart Journal flow (QR Scan + Form + Validation)
Phase 2: Frontend - Admin CRUDs (Users, Classes, Rooms, Subjects, Schedules)
Phase 2: Frontend - Admin QR Generator + B5 Template + Audit/Settings
Phase 2: Frontend - Public Real-time Monitoring page
Phase 2: E2E Testing via testing_agent_v3 (97.1% pass)
Phase 2: Fix GPS validation + AY orphan issue + active schedule auto-refresh
Phase 2: Visual verification of full flow
